name: Perplexica
short_description: AI-powered search with LLM responses - open-source Perplexity alternative.
description: Perplexica is an AI-powered search engine that uses LLMs for conversational answers with sources. This open-source Perplexity alternative offers web search integration, citations, model selection, image search, and privacy-focused design. Uses SearXNG and connects to Ollama or OpenAI.
